Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances stated on the record via Zoom.

The matter is not contested. The tentative is adopted as follows:

Plaintiffs Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED under C.C.P. section 473(a)(1). No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file and serve the First Amended Complaint forthwith on the newly added defendants: (i) Paramount Global (previously sued as Doe 1); (ii) General Electric Company (previously sued as Doe 2); (iii) Sun Ship, LLC (previously sued as Doe 3); (iv) Metropolitan Life Insurance Company (previously sued as Doe 4); (v) Hopeman Brothers, Inc. (previously sued as Does 5 & 301); (vi) Consolidated Insulation, Inc. (previously sued as Does 6 & 302); (vii) Anheuserbusch, LLC (previously sued as Doe 303); (viii) Texaco Inc. (previously sued as Doe 304); (ix) International Business Machines Corporation (previously sued as Doe 305), as well as on those defendants who have not yet appeared in the case. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all other Defendants who have previously appeared in the action.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East, Clerk: J. Alameda, Not Reported, Bailiff not Assigned, (301).

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Kimberly Chu, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, Tel. 415.898.1555, appearing for the plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF JUDITH POWERS, AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO AND AS WORNGFUL DEATH HEIR OF RONALD POWERS, DECEASED'S Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

The matter is contested. Ms. Chu presents argument in support of adding nine defendants as Does and striking causes of action 7-10.

At the conclusion of Ms. Chu's argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint is DENIED. In their moving papers, Plaintiff's sole request sought leave to add nine (9) additional defendants. However, Plaintiff's proposed First Amended Complaint, attached to the declaration of David Donadio as Exhibit A, includes four (4) additional causes of action including, (i) Aiding and Abetting Battery, (ii) Concert of Action, (iii) Fraud and Deceit/Concealment, (iv) Fraud and Deceit/Intentional Misrepresentation. These causes of action (causes of action Seven through Ten) were not alleged in the original complaint. Plaintiff has not sought permission to add new causes of action, nor have they complied with CRC rule 3.1324.

Ms. Chu is prepare and submit a form of order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/RCE)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
